failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS failed (403: Write access to repository not granted). notes: RECURRING (day 28): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 28 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-06-16). Root cause: GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT lacks contents:read permission on RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova OR iNova not in session's GitHub MCP repo scope. ACTION REQUIRED: regenerate GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT with 'Contents: Read' permission on RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova, OR add iNova to the session source repos in the environment config.
